alt.en: Douyin QR code for the Hagicode live broadcast

zh-CN.title: Hagicode 每日直播编程间
zh-CN.description: 每天 20:00 按北京时间开播，扫码进入抖音直播间。周四固定停播。

stateCopy.upcoming: 今晚 20:00 开播，18:00 起会显示直播提醒。
stateCopy.live: 直播已开始，扫码即可进入抖音直播间。
stateCopy.offline: 当前不在直播窗口，页面会自动显示下一场时间。

en.title: Daily Hagi Live Coding Room
en.description: The recurring Hagi coding stream starts at 20:00 Beijing time. Scan the Douyin QR code to join. Thursday stays offline.

stateCopy.upcoming: The room starts at 20:00 Beijing time and shows a reminder from 18:00.
stateCopy.live: The stream is live right now. Scan the QR code to join the room.
stateCopy.offline: The room is outside its active window right now. The next start time stays visible below.

time.thursdayNote: Thursday is the weekly off day
